calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
PetitionerLuisa Posas Abilar mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration re: waiver of requirement for consent to other parent on file.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Justice Anthony Guzman to Justice Anthony Martinez. The court also grants the petition for name change/mother Luisa Posa Abilar to Luisa Marquez.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Reset To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
